title: athyrium gedeanum
intro: Athyrium gedeanum, also known as Lady fern or Lady-fern, is a type of flowering fern native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Athyrium gedeanum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.
